title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. caucasica
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. caucasica, a subspecies of the orchid family, is also known as the Caucasus marsh orchid or Caucasian marsh orchid. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. caucasica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
